title: achnatherum effusum
intro: Achnatherum effusum, also known as the needle grass or blue grama, is a perennial grass species native to the western United States. The medicinal properties of Achnatherum effusum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Achnatherum effusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to treat topical wounds and skin conditions.
